title: A Short Haematology Handbook
text:
Preface
This short book demonstrates Quarto’s book project type: multiple chapters, automatic numbering, cross-chapter references, a shared bibliography, and output to both a navigable website and a single typeset PDF.
Render it with quarto render book.

title: 1  Introduction
text: Haematology spans red cells, white cells, platelets and coagulation. This book uses anaemia (Chapter 2) as a worked chapter to show cross-references, figures and citations working across a multi-file project.

title: 2  Anaemia
text:
Anaemia is classified by mean cell volume (MCV) into microcytic, normocytic and macrocytic categories.








Figure 2.1: Illustrative distribution of MCV in a mixed clinic population.





Figure 2.1 shows the three classes separated at 80 and 100 fL. Management of iron-deficiency anaemia and the wider evidence base are reviewed elsewhere (Example and Sample 2025).




Example, Alex, and Sam Sample. 2025. “An Illustrative Method Reference (Placeholder).” Journal of Reproducible Publishing 1 (1): 1–10.
